text:
Created attachment 172221
patch

I've bumped PORTREVISION because I think changes to CONFLICTS affect package.
If it is not necessary in such case, please revert PORTREVISION before commit.

- tigervnc-devel conflicts tigervnc not tigervnc-devel itself
- sort USES, USE_XORG
- bump PORTREVISION for CONFLICTS change
